name: coopcare
description: We relieve nurses in documentation and planning by using the Omaha System and support care teams in cooperation and in strengthening their clients.
author: CoopCare Project <mail@coopcare.de>

scripts.deploy:ios: QENV=development quasar build -m ios --skip-pkg; pushd src-cordova; cordova run ios --debug --device --buildConfig=build.json; popd
scripts.deploy:android: QENV=development quasar build -m android --debug -- --buildConfig=build.json; adb install dist/cordova/android/apk/release/app-release.apk
scripts.release: npm run release:version && quasar build -m android -- --buildConfig=build.json --device --release && quasar build -m electron -T all --publish && ./bin/execFromEnv.js CLEAR_PREVIOUS_UPLOAD && ./bin/execFromEnv.js ANDROID_UPLOAD && ./bin/execFromEnv.js ELECTRON_UPLOAD
scripts.release:android: npm run release:version && quasar build -m android -- --buildConfig=build.json --device --release && ./bin/execFromEnv.js ANDROID_UPLOAD
scripts.release:ios: npm run release:version && quasar build -m ios -- --buildConfig=build.json --device --release
scripts.release:testflight: npm run release:version && IS_TESTFLIGHT=true quasar build -m ios -- --buildConfig=build.json --device --release && ./bin/packageTestflight.js
scripts.icons: icongenie generate -m spa,electron --skip-trim --splashscreen-icon-ratio 0 --svg-color 960372 -i src/icons/app-icon.png; icongenie generate -m cordova --skip-trim --splashscreen-icon-ratio 0 --svg-color 960372 -i src/icons/app-icon-cordova.png -b src/icons/app-splashscreen.png
